description_long: This is a rectangular loaf-style cake generously dusted with powdered sugar, giving its surface a snowy white appearance. The cake is presented on a wooden serving board, with several slices cut and arranged to one side, revealing a dense, moist interior speckled with visible pieces of dried fruit and nuts. The crust is slightly darker and contrasts with the white sugar coating, while the interior shows a rich, golden-brown color interspersed with colorful inclusions. The powdered sugar is unevenly distributed, adding a rustic, homemade charm. The wooden board is oval-shaped and has a natural wood grain texture, complementing the artisanal look of the cake. No additional decorations or embellishments are present, emphasizing a simple, traditional presentation.
description: A rustic loaf cake dusted with powdered sugar sits on a wooden serving board, with slices revealing a fruit- and nut-filled interior. The presentation is simple and traditional, highlighting the cake's homemade appeal.
description_view_0: The cake is seen from the side, showing the full loaf and three slices arranged on the left, with the powdered sugar coating and textured wooden board clearly visible.
description_view_1: Viewed from above the loaf's length, the entire top surface is visible, showcasing the uneven powdered sugar layer and the slices positioned at the far end.
description_view_2: This side view displays the loaf from the opposite direction, with the cut slices now on the right, emphasizing the cake's length and the board's oval shape.
description_view_3: A frontal view of the cake, focusing on the cut end and the interior texture of the slices, highlighting the fruit and nut inclusions.
materials: cake (flour, sugar, eggs, dried fruit, nuts)
